isolation.constraint: Stick to Phase Compare tab only; do not modify era filter

steps.expected: Phase Compare view with two dropdown selectors
steps.observed: Phase Comparison heading displayed with Phase A and Phase B dropdown selectors and description text

steps.action: Select Phase 1 and Phase 8 using dropdowns
steps.expected: Side-by-side comparison table appears with metrics
steps.observed: Comparison table appeared with 5 metric rows (Overall Score, Retrieval Score, Plausibility Score, Recall Mean, Retention AUC) and IMPROVEMENT column

steps.expected: Phase 1: 25 total exps, 24 scored, overall_score mean=0.3716, best=0.3960
steps.observed: Phase 1: Early Exploration — 24 experiments (24 scored). Overall Score: 0.3716 (best: 0.3960)

steps.expected: Phase 8: 45 total exps, 43 scored, overall_score mean=0.3226, best=0.4630
steps.observed: Phase 8: LongMemEval Auto-Research — 44 experiments (43 scored). Overall Score: 0.3226 (best: 0.4630)

steps.action: Cross-check overall_score mean for Phase 1 against raw results.json files
steps.expected: Mean matches calculated value from Python script
steps.observed: Python script: Phase 1 mean=0.3716, best=0.3960 — EXACT MATCH

steps.action: Cross-check overall_score mean for Phase 8 against raw results.json files
steps.expected: Mean matches calculated value from Python script
steps.observed: Python script: Phase 8 mean=0.3226, best=0.4630 — EXACT MATCH

steps.expected: Matches Python calculation
steps.observed: Python: 0.3427, UI: 0.3427 — EXACT MATCH

steps.expected: Matches Python calculation
steps.observed: Python: 0.5584, UI: 0.5584 — EXACT MATCH

steps.expected: Matches Python calculation
steps.observed: Python: 0.5885, UI: 0.5885 — EXACT MATCH

steps.expected: Matches Python calculation
steps.observed: Python: 0.7512, UI: 0.7512 — EXACT MATCH

steps.expected: Phase 1: exp_0004 (validation_failed) excluded from calculations
steps.observed: Phase 1 shows 25 exps total but 24 scored — 1 validation_failed (exp_0004) excluded. Confirmed via Python script.

steps.expected: Correct calculation of (phaseB - phaseA) / phaseA
steps.observed: Overall: -13.17% ✓, Retrieval: +3.07% ✓, Plausibility: +12.79% ✓, Recall: +35.51% ✓

steps.action: Verify Retention AUC shows N/A for Phase 1 (old era, no retention data)
steps.expected: N/A displayed for Phase 1 Retention AUC
steps.observed: Retention AUC row shows 'N/A (best: N/A)' for Phase 1 and '0.7512 (best: 0.8079)' for Phase 8

steps.expected: Single-experiment phase shows correct comparison
steps.observed: Phase 7 vs Phase 8 comparison works. Phase 7: 1 experiment (1 scored) with single-value means matching exp_lme_0000's results.

steps.expected: Both memories_500 and LongMemEval experiments included
steps.observed: Phase 1 (old era, exp_0000-0024) and Phase 8 (LME era, exp_lme_0001-0045) both included. Era filter remained on 'All'.

steps.expected: No console errors
steps.observed: No console errors on Phase Compare tab

steps.expected: Snapshot Viewer with experiment selector dropdown
steps.observed: Snapshot Viewer heading with experiment dropdown, tick controls, and empty Plotly chart

steps.action: Check if exp_lme_0001 (no results.json) is in Snapshot Viewer dropdown
steps.expected: Experiments without snapshot data excluded from dropdown
steps.observed: exp_lme_0001 NOT in dropdown. Dropdown shows 454 experiments (out of 468 total) — only experiments with snapshot data included.

steps.action: Check if exp_0360 (empty directory) is in Snapshot Viewer dropdown
steps.expected: Empty experiments excluded from dropdown
steps.observed: exp_0360 NOT in dropdown. Confirmed filtered out.

steps.expected: Forgetting Depth & CV Analysis view with charts and CV experiment selector
steps.observed: Two forgetting depth charts visible, Cross-Validation Results section with 'Select experiment with CV data...' dropdown

steps.action: Check CV experiment selector dropdown options
steps.expected: Only experiments with cv_results.json listed
steps.observed: 7 experiments listed: exp_0315, exp_lme_0008, exp_lme_0046, exp_lme_0049, exp_lme_0051, exp_lme_0056, exp_lme_0090. All have cv_results.json. Non-CV experiments not listed.

steps.action: Verify exp_lme_0056 (validation_failed but has CV data) is in CV dropdown
steps.expected: Edge case experiment included since it has cv_results.json
steps.observed: exp_lme_0056 IS listed in CV dropdown — correct edge case handling.

steps.expected: Retention curve overlay with experiment selector
steps.observed: Retention Curve Overlay heading with multi-select dropdown showing 'Select 2-5 experiments with retention data...'

steps.action: Verify retention dropdown pre-filters to experiments with retention data
steps.expected: 114 experiments with retention data, no experiments without
steps.observed: 114 experiments in dropdown. exp_lme_0001 (no results), exp_0001 (no retention), exp_0360 (empty) all excluded.

steps.action: Check if 'unavailable' message is reachable for retention curves
steps.expected: Either unreachable (pre-filtered) or shown gracefully
steps.observed: NOT reachable through UI — dropdown pre-filters to only experiments WITH retention data. This is correct behavior.

steps.action: Check console errors across all tabs tested
steps.expected: No console errors
steps.observed: No console errors on any tested tab

frictions.description: Dash custom dropdowns (for Phase Compare phase selectors and CV experiment selector) do not respond to Playwright click on option elements. Must use JavaScript (document.querySelectorAll('.dash-dropdown-option').find(...).click()) to select options. The first dropdown (Phase 1) responded to agent-browser click, but the second (Phase 8) did not — inconsistent behavior.
frictions.resolution: Used JavaScript DOM manipulation to click .dash-dropdown-option elements for selections that didn't respond to Playwright clicks.

frictions.description: CV dropdown initially showed 0 options despite being on the analysis page. The options callback requires active_page=='analysis' but the dropdown wasn't populated until directly clicking the button element via JavaScript. Standard agent-browser click on the button element did not open the dropdown.
frictions.resolution: Used document.querySelector('#cv-exp-selector').click() via JavaScript to open the dropdown, after which options were visible.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-PARAMS-005: Phase Comparison Panel correctly displays side-by-side statistics for two selected phases with accurate mean calculations (cross-checked against raw results.json), validation_failed exclusion, improvement percentages, and N/A for unavailable metrics. VAL-PARAMS-007: Missing data handled gracefully — Snapshot Viewer filters to 454/468 experiments with snapshots, CV panel filters to 7 experiments with cv_results.json (including edge case exp_lme_0056), and Retention dropdown pre-filters to 114 experiments with retention data.
